                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.

messages.text:
Welcome to QCViz-MCP v3. I can run quantum
                    chemistry calculations using PySCF with Gemini AI planning.
                    Ask me to compute energies, optimize geometries, visualize
                    orbitals and ESP maps. Supports Korean input and ion pairs.

This looks more like a chemistry question than an explicit calculation request.If you want an explanation, ask the concept directly.If you want a calculation, tell me the molecule and the task together.Examples: benzene HOMO 보여줘, water ESP map, acetone optimize.{
